# Ingantt Help — 한국어

> Documentation for Ingantt, a project scheduling application.

## 시작하기

- [개요](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/getting-started/overview/index.md)
- [시작하기](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/getting-started/getting-started/index.md)
- [AI로 생성하기](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/getting-started/create-with-ai/index.md)
- [AI로 편집하기](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/getting-started/edit-with-ai/index.md)
- [가져오기 및 내보내기](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/getting-started/import-export/index.md)

## 프로젝트 설정

- [프로젝트 속성](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/setting-up-project/project/index.md)
- [달력](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/setting-up-project/calendars/index.md)

## 일정 작성

- [작업](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/tasks/index.md)
- [작업 속성](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/task-properties/index.md)
- [종속성](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/dependencies/index.md)
- [제약 조건](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/constraints/index.md)
- [자원](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/resources/index.md)
- [배정](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/building-schedule/assignments/index.md)

## 분석 및 조정

- [주공정경로](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/adjusting-schedule/critical-path/index.md)
- [자원 평준화](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/adjusting-schedule/leveling/index.md)
- [사용자 정의 필드](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/adjusting-schedule/custom-fields/index.md)

- [비용 이해하기](https://help.ingantt.com/ko/planning-costs/planning-costs/index.md)
